capability: the reserve mass held for an as-yet-unseen atom tracks the recent novelty rate (signal-derived amplitude) rather than a hand-set constant
claim: p(unseen next) read off the same fixed Born step predicts next-unit newcomer arrival STRICTLY better when the reserve amplitude is the γ-decayed recent newcomer count (R_t = γ·R_{t-1} + newcomers_t) than when it is the constant 1.0 — and the win comes specifically from CLUSTERED novelty, vanishing where novelty is memoryless and matching the constant where novelty declines monotonically.
mechanism_tag: gamma-decayed recent newcomer rate as Born reserve amplitude; context enters at the amplitude, the normalization novelty/(sum+novelty) is unchanged

predicted_dissociation.clustered: signal log-loss < constant log-loss by a clear margin, in BOTH the text organ and the music organ (the omnimodal gate)
predicted_dissociation.iid: |signal − constant| within noise — the recent rate carries no information beyond the base rate, so the fix must NOT win here (catches recency-overfitting)
predicted_dissociation.monotone: signal ≈ constant (signal not worse than constant by more than a small tolerance) — the constant's home turf, where 1/(sum+1) already tracks the declining hazard; the fix must MATCH, not crush or collapse

control_first: Read iid and monotone before clustered. If the signal also beats the constant on iid by a comparable margin, the win is a surface artifact of always-reacting, not the mechanism — VOID the result. If the signal collapses on monotone, the fix threw away the mass-decay the constant captured — reject.
instrument_checks: the realized newcomer stream read from each organ's INS log must reproduce the intended clustering (clustered: high autocorrelation/burstiness; iid: ~flat; monotone: front-loaded)
the pNew channel must be computed by the real interior forwardDist (not all-zeros, not constant across units for the signal arm)
constant arm pNew must be monotonically non-increasing within a run (1/(Σm+1) shape) — a sanity check that the baseline is the live engine's reserve
predicted_signature: for the signal arm, mean reserve amplitude during newcomer bursts >> during confirmation stretches; for the constant arm, the reserve amplitude is 1.0 throughout (flat) — the mechanism is visible in the amplitude, not only the score
